families.evidence: date/version naming and same .NET WASM lineage
families.decision: create a dedicated product-family repository only after commit/tree comparison; preserve each source as an import branch, then select a canonical baseline

families.evidence: shared CPD/helpdesk/event domain; one member is zero-size and one is private
families.decision: do not infer supersession from date; inspect business modules, contents and ancestry

families.evidence: shared .NET/Blazor technology with mixed sample and application purposes
families.decision: technology cluster only; split into templates, experiments and business/product families before any branch import

families.evidence: overlapping AI/agent domain with probable external origins
families.decision: compare origin, license and unique commits before migration

families.evidence: both address persistent agent memory/context but may use different abstractions
families.decision: compare data model, learning loop, retrieval lifecycle and integration value; not yet duplicates
catalog provenance, licenses and update cadence; consolidate only original or license-compatible normalized material

families.evidence: tool execution, workflow, social and communication automation relationship
families.decision: integration domain, not duplicate family; evaluate trust boundaries, credential handling and connector reuse
preserve upstream boundaries; compare unique commits and operational fit rather than merge source trees
keep separate unless the profile repository embeds redundant generated copies

families.evidence: design/visual communication overlap but materially different roles
families.decision: keep separate; inspect whether open-design vendors or embeds Mermaid assets

families.evidence: strong naming relationship and similar legacy/test context
families.decision: compare file trees, manifests and histories in the next batch before designating a product family
possible product family; inspect features and data models before creating a dedicated family repository

consolidation_policy.unit: one repository per proven product family, not per name similarity
consolidation_policy.required_manifest: MIGRATION-MANIFEST.md records source repository, source branch, source commit, imported branch, unique files, merge decisions and validation status

warning: Name similarity and domain overlap are discovery signals only. Canonical-version decisions require branch, commit ancestry, manifest, license, upstream and unique-file comparison.
